framework.name: Visa Intelligent Commerce (VIC) Four-Layer Stack
framework.description: Visa's complete agentic payment architecture launched April 2025: (1) Scoped AMT Tokens (merchant+amount+duration+SKU constraints), (2) Trusted Agent Protocol (TAP) with cryptographic agent passports verified against a central registry, (3) Delegated Authentication via FIDO2 Passkeys eliminating real-time SCA, (4) MCP integration for machine-readable merchant endpoints. Three-phase lifecycle: Provisioning→Instruction→Execution.
framework.raw_quote: VIC issues Agent-Merchant-Task (AMT) Tokens. Unlike standard merchant-locked tokens, these are 'programmable' and restricted by user-defined boundaries

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce: How Visa is Architecting the Era of Agentic ...
